rows.label: tev022302_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, have you seen Arsenican's kid yet?
It's kind of shocking, actually. I was
all like, "Hey, congratu—BLAAAAARGH!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022302_MSG0002
rows.name:
I mean, did you know they just
barf up their children?! Like,
from their own mouths?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022302_MSG0003
rows.name:
And I don't even know if Arsenican
is the mother or the father! So
weird, man. So totally weird...[ST:wait ]
